nasb.text: Yet to this day the Lord has not given you a heart to know, nor eyes to see, nor ears to hear.

esv.text: But to this day the Lord has not given you a heart to understand or eyes to see or ears to hear.

cnv.text: 但是直到今日，耶和華還沒有給你們一顆能明白的心，能看見的眼睛，能聽見的耳朵。

ccb.text: 但耶和华至今还没有赐给你们能明白的心、能看见的眼、能听清的耳。
